summary_text: - **Critical: default production path bypasses local contract guards and can write directly.** `xauto-draft-only.sh` defaults to `GENERATOR_MODE=external`; in `--mode execute` it forwards `--write-notion` without local validation for evidence/proper-noun/non-X-primary rules. If external generator is weak, bad drafts can be persisted. [xauto-draft-only.sh#L16](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L16), [xauto-draft-only.sh#L173](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto-draft-only.sh#L173), [x-auto-contract.md#L46](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L46), [x-auto-contract.md#L59](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L59) - **Critical: evidence rule is not enforced in generator output.** Current local generator has no hard validator for numeric/outcome claims traceability/context-fit, so production drafts can violate medical/effect-size evidence requirements. [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L533](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L533), [x-auto-contract.md#L48](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L48), [x-auto-contract.md#L51](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L51) - **High: proper-noun protection is materially under-scoped.** Leak detection relies on a tiny blocklist plus handle/URL checks; many company/person/product nouns can pass, violating contract defaults. [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L20](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L20), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L317](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L317), [x-auto-contract.md#L59](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md#L59) - **High: blocked candidates are still emitted in `created`, enabling downstream misuse if consumers key off `created` instead of `promotable/accepted`.** Registry-local sets `dispatchable/promotable` correctly, but structural ambiguity remains for any downstream that reads the wrong collection. [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L604](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L604), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L676](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L676), [xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L677](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/xauto_generate_drafts_from_registry.py#L677)
